title: Fuengirola Port Yacht Rental: A 2026 Guide to Costs and Boats
html:
Fuengirola Port is a bustling hub on the Costa del Sol, offering easy access to the Mediterranean for a day on the water. Yacht rental in Fuengirola Port typically starts from around EUR 350 for a half-day motorboat and can exceed EUR 2,500 for a crewed luxury yacht, with options listed on BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace for boat rental.

Where to set off in Fuengirola Port

Charter boats depart from several well-equipped marinas in and around Fuengirola Port. The main departure point is Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola, which offers visitor berths and charter bases. Other options include Puerto Benalmádena, six nautical miles east, known for its marina village and restaurants. Further west, Puerto de la Duquesa and Sotogrande provide alternative start points for longer itineraries. For island trips, boats often head to the Cabo de Gata natural park or stop at the Balearic Islands for extended cruises.

How much does it cost to rent a yacht in Fuengirola Port?

Prices vary widely by boat type, season, and duration, from EUR 100 per person for shared tours to EUR 3,500 for a full-day crewed yacht. A half-day rental of a small motorboat (e.g., Axopar 28) costs around EUR 400, 600 in low season, rising to EUR 800 in high season. Full-day catamaran charters for up to 12 guests range from EUR 1,200 to EUR 2,200. For a premium experience, a crewed Azimut 58 or Sunseeker motor yacht can cost EUR 2,000, 3,500 per day, including skipper and fuel.

  • Shared tour (1, 2 hours): EUR 50, 100 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): EUR 350, 800
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours, up to 12 guests): EUR 1,200, 2,200
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (up to 10 guests): EUR 2,000, 3,500

Which boat to rent in Fuengirola Port

  1. Motor Yacht (Azimut 58), Ideal for stylish cruising and entertaining up to 10 guests, from EUR 2,500 per day. See the Azimut 58 listing for details.
  2. Catamaran (Lagoon 42), Spacious and stable for families or groups of up to 12, with a full-day price from EUR 1,400.
  3. Open Motorboat (Axopar 28), Versatile for watersports and coastal exploring, carrying up to 8 guests from EUR 500 per half-day.
  4. Luxury Cruiser (Fairline Squadron 50), Combines comfort and performance for up to 8 guests, costing from EUR 1,800 per day.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Fuengirola Port?

For bareboat rentals without a skipper, a valid boating licence recognised under Spanish law is required; the operator confirms exact requirements. In Spain, a Patrón de Embarcación de Recreo (PER) is typical for boats up to 24 metres, though international licences may be accepted if endorsed. For skippered charters, no licence is needed, you simply enjoy the ride. The best season for yacht rental runs from May to October, when the Levante wind can bring breezy afternoons, but sea conditions remain calm near the coast.

If you plan to anchor for lunch, arrive by midday at popular spots like Cabopino Cove to secure a spot before the afternoon crowds arrive.

At a glance

  • Price range (per day): EUR 350 (small motorboat half-day) to EUR 3,500 (crewed luxury yacht)
  • Peak months: May through October
  • Typical trip length: 4 hours (half-day) or 8 hours (full-day)
  • Maximum guests: 8, 12 depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Fuengirola Port

Can I rent a boat for a day trip to Marbella?

Yes, many charters include Marbella as a stop; the crossing from Fuengirola Port to Marbella’s Puerto Banús takes about an hour by powerboat.

Are there options for overnight stays on board?

Some yachts offer overnight berths; catamarans and motor yachts with cabins can be booked for multi-day trips with prior arrangement.

Is fuel included in the rental price?

Fuel is usually extra for bareboat rentals but often included in crewed charters; always check the listing description.

What happens if the weather is poor?

Operators typically cancel or reschedule trips if conditions are unsafe, with refunds or alternative dates offered.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Fuengirola Port and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
